## Testing

Verify:

- [ ] Plugin builds without errors: `npm run build`
- [ ] Plugin loads in Stream Deck without crashes
- [ ] API authentication works with valid credentials (if applicable)
- [ ] Data displays correctly on Stream Deck keys (if applicable)
- [ ] Property Inspector shows configuration options (if applicable)
- [ ] Errors are handled gracefully (network issues, invalid credentials)
- [ ] No console errors or warnings
- [ ] Logs are informative but not excessive

## Screenshots (if applicable)

Please add screenshots or videos for UI changes.

## Checklist

- [ ] I have followed the code style of this project
- [ ] I have added comments for complex logic
- [ ] I have tested thoroughly on Windows (macOS testing appreciated)
- [ ] I have not committed credentials or API keys
- [ ] I have updated documentation if needed
- [ ] My commits use conventional prefixes: `Add:`, `Fix:`, `Update:`, `Refactor:`, `Docs:`
